name: validate-source-file: accepts a file that has source: header with all 9 required fields plus a 2.1-conformant rules array
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: Acme
  authoritative_url: "https://a.com"
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z"
  content_hash: "sha256:S"
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules:
  - id: g-x-001
    name: rule-x
    description: avoid the bad pattern in source
    detector: rubric/detectors/x.sh
    type: problem
    fixable: null
    has_suggestions: false
    deprecated: false
    replaced_by: []
    docs_url: "https://a.com"
    requires_type_checking: false
    recommended: true
    severity: P1
    version: 1.0.0
    semver: 1.0.0
    rule_state: warn-only
    provenance:
      - source: x
        class: published-standard
        section_id: x
        url: "https://a.com"
        fetched_at: "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z"
        content_hash: "sha256:S"
recommended_set: [g-x-001]
all_set: [g-x-001]
' > file.yaml
